name: abrdn Gold ETF Trust
business: The purpose of the abrdn Gold ETF Trust is to own gold transferred to the Trust in exchange for shares issued by the Trust. The investment objective is for the Shares to reflect the performance of the price of gold bullion, less the Trust's expenses.

exposures.sentence: The investment objective of the Trust is for the Shares to reflect the performance of the price of gold bullion, less the Trust's expenses.
